title: xyris porcata
intro: Xyris porcata, also known as the swamp yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Xyris porcata include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in the form of essential oils and extracts.
